description_te: భూమి హక్కు పత్రాలను modernize చేసే చట్టం. Digital land records + guaranteed land titles + తగాదాల పరిష్కారం.
description_en: Land Titling Act to modernize land records. Digital land records + guaranteed land titles + dispute resolution.

eligibility_criteria.automatic: Automatic coverage for all registered land owners
eligibility_criteria.dispute_resolution: Land disputes can be filed under this act

benefit_amount: Free digital land title certificate + Government guarantee on title
application_process_te:
1. Revenue Sadassulu (camps) ద్వారా automatic survey
2. Digital title generation
3. Objections ఉంటే 30 రోజులలో file చేయవచ్చు
4. Title settlement officer ద్వారా dispute resolution
